titleStmt.title: SII 29.67: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 67. (A.R. No. 85 of 1961-62.) KOLANUPĀKA, BHUVANAGIRI TALUK, NALGONDA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar (No. 6) dugout from the main street in the village.

Mentions the rule of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla and states that prince Sōmēśvara made a gift of 12 mattar of wet land to Āditya-bhaṭṭa Sōmayāji on the occasion of offering mahādānas after dēvatārchana and that under his instructions mahāpradhāna, sandhivigrahi, daṇḍanāyaka Kāḷimarasa allotted at the donee's choice, land situated under the main canal (hiriya-kāluve) at Iṭṭikāla in Koḷḷipāke-7000.
It is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year 35, Vikṛiti, Kārttika, Puṇṇami, Ādivāra. It corresponds to 1110 A.D., October 29, Saturday (not Sunday). Lunar eclipse occured on that day.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samasta
bhuvanāśra
ya śrī pṛthvīva
llabha mahā
rājādhirāja pa
ramēśvara para
ma bhaṭṭāra
kaṁ satyāśra
ya kulatilakaṁ
cāḷukyābha
raṇaṁ śrīma
tribhuvanama
lladēvara vija
yarājyamu
ttarōttarābhi

vriddhi pravarddhamā
namācaṁdrā(rkka)
tāraṁ saluttami
re śrī mattribhu
vanamalladēvara
magaṁ samasta nṟi
pa janastutya sa
tyavākyaṁ koṁgu
ḷi dharmma varmmaFor varmmadharmma mahArAja etc.
mahārājādhirā
ja paramēśvaraṁ ko
ḷāḷapuravarēśva
raṁ naṁdagiri nā
thaṁ śauca māndhā
taṁ madagajē
ndra lāṁchanaṁ ma
yūra piṁccha
dhvaja vīrājamā
naṁ padmāvatīla
bdha varaprasādaṁ
mrigamadāmō
da jayadutta raṁ
ga nanniya gaṁga
vibudha cintāma
ṇi maṇḍaḷi

kamakuṭa cūḍā
maṇi dhairyyama
hāvarāhaṁ vīra
śrī kē(ḷi)gēhaṁ ripu
rāyamada nivā
raṇaṁ bappana gaṁdhavā
raṇaṁ nāmādi sa
masta praśasti sa
hitaṁ śrīmaccā
ḷukya gaṁga permmā
ḍi śrī manmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ ku
māraṁ sōmēśva
radēvaru śrīma
ccāḷukya vikrama
varṣa 35 neya vikṛti
saṁvatsarada kārttika
da puṇnami Ādivā
ra daṁdu sōmagraha
ṇa nimittadiṁ dēva
tārccanā naṁtara
dalu mahādāna
ṁgaḷuṁ māḍu
tta

Āditya bhaṭṭa
sōmayājiga
ḷge haṁnirmmattaru
nīru nelanaṁ dhā
rā pūrvvakaṁ
māḍi koṭṭa(r) . śrī
manmahā pradhā
naṁ saṁdhivigrahi
daṇḍanāyakaṁ
kāḷimarasa rddha
samukhādēśadiṁ
koḷḷipāke nāḍoḷa
koṁḍūralu 12
rmmattaru nīru ne
lana koḍiveṁdu be
sasalu koḷḷipāke 7
sāsirada baḷiya
Iṭṭikāla hiriya
kālveyalu 12 ma
ttaru nīrnnelana para
mēśvara dattiyā
gi koṭṭa śāsanaṁ .
śrīśrīśrī .This line has been
Digital edition of SII 29.67 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
